message:
test: expand integration and edge-case test coverage across engine and extension modules

Add 35+ new test suites and update existing ones covering extensive edge-case
and integration scenarios across the engine and extension host:

New integration tests:
- attestation_handshake, epoch_invalidation, feature_parity_tracker,
  guardplane_calibration, incident_replay_bundle, interleaving_explorer,
  marker_stream, policy_controller, principal_key_roles, proof_ingestion,
  recovery_artifact, reputation, revocation_chain, saga_orchestrator,
  static_authority_analyzer

New edge-case tests:
- anti_entropy, attested_execution_cell, baseline_interpreter, cx_threading,
  error_code, evidence_replay_checker, expected_loss_selector,
  extension_lifecycle_manager, fleet_convergence, forensic_replayer,
  policy_theorem_compiler, portfolio_governor, revocation_chain,
  saga_orchestrator, self_replacement, translation_validation,
  trust_economics

Extension host tests:
- capability_escrow_adversarial, capability_escrow_and_emergency_grants

PLAS test suites:
- plas_benchmark_bundle, plas_burn_in_gate_integration, plas_lockstep_integration

Updated existing tests for capability witness, checkpoint frontier, IFC artifacts,
incident replay bundle, privacy learning contract, shadow evaluation gate, trust
card edge cases, and delegate cell edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
